name: chain_built_a_selfhealing_error_system_that_w
method: Built a self-healing error system that watches my prod logs, launches Claude to fix bugs, and I approve fixes from Telegram I run a couple of Node.js services and got really tired of constantly checki

stages.task: tail service logs from all deployed apps, fingerprint errors via hash(message+stack[0:3]), deduplicate bursts within 10min window, emit only unique errors
claude -p each unique error with full stack + surrounding code context, generate targeted minimal patch with explanation
POST fix diff to Telegram bot with inline keyboard (Approve/Reject/Skip), 30min timeout defaults to skip
apply approved patches via git, run smoke test, commit if clean — rollback and notify if test fails
